summary: Frontend-only verification of (1) Earn & Burn Control on /admin/loyalty and (2) Live Bill Monitor RETURN pill + 'Recd' ingestion time. All 8 acceptance criteria from the review_request passed. Global loyalty config restored to ACTIVE/no pause windows after testing.

test_results_detail.login: PASS — superadmin@fundle.io logs into CRM and lands on /admin (Command Center).
test_results_detail.ebc_section_visible: PASS — EARN & BURN CONTROL section rendered above COMPLIANCE. Both master switches present with state 'Currently ACTIVE' and 'Stop' button.
test_results_detail.earn_master_toggle: PASS — Click Stop → state 'Currently STOPPED', label 'Start', toast 'Earning stopped'. Click Start → 'Currently ACTIVE', label 'Stop', toast 'Earning resumed'.
test_results_detail.add_pause_modal_open: PASS — Add Pause Window button opens modal (data-testid=pause-modal) with label/start/end/earn/burn fields.
test_results_detail.validation_empty_dates: PASS — Submitting empty form shows toast 'Start and end dates are required'.
test_results_detail.validation_no_checkbox: PASS — Submitting with both checkboxes unchecked shows toast 'Select Earn and/or Burn to pause'.
test_results_detail.add_pause_valid: PASS — Valid submission (TEST_pause, 2026-12-01 → 2026-12-05, earn checked) adds row to pauses-table with columns Label/Start/End/Pauses(Earn)/Status(Active). Toast 'Pause window added'.
test_results_detail.pause_toggle: PASS — pause-toggle-<id> click flips status badge from 'Active' to 'Inactive'.
test_results_detail.pause_delete: PASS — pause-del-<id> click removes the row, toast 'Pause window removed', empty-state message restored.
test_results_detail.live_monitor_filter: PASS — lm-fil-start-date=2026-05-01, lm-fil-end-date=2026-06-30 loads 18 bills (Bills KPI=18, Returns KPI=6).
test_results_detail.return_pill_type_column: PASS — Exactly 6 RETURN pills found with data-testid starting lm-type-return- (RET-INVK31232400005-79942f, RET-RETSRC-ea4749e5-ed7f04, RET-RETSRC-97ec3e79-995fe1, RET-RETSRC-4a004f5b-3caec8, RET-RETSRC-96fa5cd1-c57f49, +1). Non-return bills continue to show REPEAT/NEW/WALK-IN text in TYPE column.
test_results_detail.recd_subline: PASS — 18 'Recd <date, time>' sublines rendered under Bill Date column (one per row).
test_results_detail.bill_drawer_fields: PASS — Clicking a RET- row opens Bill Detail drawer showing both 'BILL DATE' (e.g. '01 Jun 2026, 07:38 am') and 'RECEIVED' (e.g. '01 Jun 2026, 07:38 am') fields, plus 'RETURN: YES' indicator.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: non-RETURN TYPE cells (NEW/REPEAT/WALK-IN) do not expose a data-testid like lm-type-new-/lm-type-repeat-/lm-type-walkin-, only RETURN does. Consider adding consistent testids for all type pills for future-proof automation. NOT blocking.

Console warning (pre-existing, unrelated to this iteration): React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' inside CommandCenter store/city dropdowns (data-testid=cc-store). Should be cleaned up by main agent.
seed_data_creation: Temporary pause window 'TEST_pause' (2026-12-01 → 2026-12-05, earn-only) was created and then DELETED. Earn & Burn master switches were toggled Stop→Start and finally LEFT ACTIVE. Loyalty global config restored to pre-test state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All EBC + Live Monitor UI flows pass end-to-end. The lm-type-return- testids are present only for return bills (intentional per spec). The pause window endpoints (POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/loyalty/pauses) all return 200 from the UI's perspective.
